title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows children riding scooters. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two children are riding scooters on a path in a park. They are wearing helmets and travelling side by side. There are trees, grass, a bench and a woman walking in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people buying bread. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A man and his young son are buying bread in a bakery. The boy is pointing at some cakes while the assistant is putting bread into a bag. There are shelves with bread and pastries behind the counter.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
